name: general:border_size
description: size of the border around windows

name: general:gaps_in
description: gaps between windows

name: general:gaps_out
description: gaps between windows and monitor edges

name: general:float_gaps
description: gaps between windows and monitor edges for floating windows

name: general:gaps_workspaces
description: gaps between workspaces. Stacks with gaps_out.

name: general:col.inactive_border
description: border color for inactive windows

name: general:col.active_border
description: border color for the active window

name: general:col.nogroup_border
description: inactive border color for window that cannot be added to a group

name: general:col.nogroup_border_active
description: active border color for window that cannot be added to a group

name: general:layout
description: which layout to use. [dwindle/master]

name: general:no_focus_fallback
description: if true, will not fall back to the next available window when moving focus in a direction where no window was found

name: general:resize_on_border
description: enables resizing windows by clicking and dragging on borders and gaps

name: general:extend_border_grab_area
description: extends the area around the border where you can click and drag on, only used when general:resize_on_border is on.

name: general:hover_icon_on_border
description: show a cursor icon when hovering over borders, only used when general:resize_on_border is on.

name: general:allow_tearing
description: master switch for allowing tearing to occur.

name: general:resize_corner
description: force floating windows to use a specific corner when being resized (1-4 going clockwise from top left, 0 to disable)

name: general:snap:enabled
description: enable snapping for floating windows

name: general:snap:window_gap
description: minimum gap in pixels between windows before snapping

name: general:snap:monitor_gap
description: minimum gap in pixels between window and monitor edges before snapping

name: general:snap:border_overlap
description: if true, windows snap such that only one border's worth of space is between them

name: general:snap:respect_gaps
description: if true, snapping will respect gaps between windows

name: general:modal_parent_blocking
description: if true, parent windows of modals will not be interactive.

name: general:locale
description: overrides the system locale

name: decoration:rounding
description: rounded corners' radius (in layout px)

name: decoration:rounding_power
description: rounding power of corners (2 is a circle)

name: decoration:active_opacity
description: opacity of active windows.

name: decoration:inactive_opacity
description: opacity of inactive windows.

name: decoration:fullscreen_opacity
description: opacity of fullscreen windows.

name: decoration:shadow:enabled
description: enable drop shadows on windows

name: decoration:shadow:range
description: Shadow range (size) in layout px

name: decoration:shadow:render_power
description: in what power to render the falloff (more power, the faster the falloff)

name: decoration:shadow:sharp
description: whether the shadow should be sharp or not.

name: decoration:shadow:color
description: shadow's color. Alpha dictates shadow's opacity.

name: decoration:shadow:color_inactive
description: inactive shadow color. (if not set, will fall back to col.shadow)

name: decoration:shadow:offset
description: shadow's rendering offset.

name: decoration:shadow:scale
description: shadow's scale.

name: decoration:glow:enabled
description: enable inner glow on windows

name: decoration:glow:range
description: glow range (size) in layout px

name: decoration:glow:render_power
description: in what power to render the falloff (more power, the faster the falloff)

name: decoration:glow:color
description: glow's color. Alpha dictates glow's opacity.

name: decoration:glow:color_inactive
description: inactive glow color. (if not set, will fall back to decoration:glow:color)

name: decoration:dim_modal
description: enables dimming of parents of modal windows

name: decoration:dim_inactive
description: enables dimming of inactive windows

name: decoration:dim_strength
description: how much inactive windows should be dimmed

name: decoration:dim_special
description: how much to dim the rest of the screen by when a special workspace is open.

name: decoration:dim_around
description: how much the dimaround window rule should dim by.

name: decoration:screen_shader
description: a path to a custom shader to be applied at the end of rendering.

name: decoration:border_part_of_window
description: whether the border should be treated as a part of the window.

name: decoration:blur:enabled
description: enable kawase window background blur

name: decoration:blur:size
description: blur size (distance)

name: decoration:blur:passes
description: the amount of passes to perform

name: decoration:blur:ignore_opacity
description: make the blur layer ignore the opacity of the window

name: decoration:blur:new_optimizations
description: whether to enable further optimizations to the blur.

name: decoration:blur:xray
description: if enabled, floating windows will ignore tiled windows in their blur.

name: decoration:blur:noise
description: how much noise to apply.

name: decoration:blur:contrast
description: contrast modulation for blur.

name: decoration:blur:brightness
description: brightness modulation for blur.

name: decoration:blur:vibrancy
description: Increase saturation of blurred colors.

name: decoration:blur:vibrancy_darkness
description: How strong the effect of vibrancy is on dark areas.

name: decoration:blur:special
description: whether to blur behind the special workspace (note: expensive)

name: decoration:blur:popups
description: whether to blur popups (e.g. right-click menus)

name: decoration:blur:popups_ignorealpha
description: works like ignorealpha in layer rules. If pixel opacity is below set value, will not blur.

name: decoration:blur:input_methods
description: whether to blur input methods (e.g. fcitx5)

name: decoration:blur:input_methods_ignorealpha
description: works like ignorealpha in layer rules. If pixel opacity is below set value, will not blur.

name: animations:enabled
description: enable animations

name: animations:workspace_wraparound
description: changes the direction of slide animations between the first and last workspaces

name: input:kb_model
description: Appropriate XKB keymap parameter.

name: input:kb_layout
description: Appropriate XKB keymap parameter

name: input:kb_variant
description: Appropriate XKB keymap parameter

name: input:kb_options
description: Appropriate XKB keymap parameter

name: input:kb_rules
description: Appropriate XKB keymap parameter

name: input:kb_file
description: Appropriate XKB keymap file

name: input:numlock_by_default
description: Engage numlock by default.

name: input:resolve_binds_by_sym
description: Determines how keybinds act when multiple layouts are used.

name: input:repeat_rate
description: The repeat rate for held-down keys, in repeats per second.

name: input:repeat_delay
description: Delay before a held-down key is repeated, in milliseconds.

name: input:sensitivity
description: Sets the mouse input sensitivity. Value is clamped to the range -1.0 to 1.0.

name: input:accel_profile
description: Sets the cursor acceleration profile. [adaptive/flat/custom]

name: input:force_no_accel
description: Force no cursor acceleration.

name: input:rotation
description: Sets the rotation of a device in degrees clockwise. Value is clamped to the range 0 to 359.

name: input:left_handed
description: Switches RMB and LMB

name: input:scroll_points
description: Sets the scroll acceleration profile, when accel_profile is set to custom.

name: input:scroll_method
description: Sets the scroll method. [2fg/edge/on_button_down/no_scroll]

name: input:scroll_button
description: Sets the scroll button. 0 means default.

name: input:scroll_button_lock
description: If the scroll button lock is enabled, the button does not need to be held down.

name: input:scroll_factor
description: Multiplier added to scroll movement for external mice.

name: input:natural_scroll
description: Inverts scrolling direction.

name: input:follow_mouse
description: Specify if and how cursor movement should affect window focus.

name: input:follow_mouse_threshold
description: The smallest distance in logical pixels the mouse needs to travel for the window under it to get focused.

name: input:focus_on_close
description: Controls the window focus behavior when a window is closed.

name: input:mouse_refocus
description: if disabled, mouse focus won't switch to the hovered window unless the mouse crosses a window boundary when follow_mouse=1.

name: input:float_switch_override_focus
description: If enabled (1 or 2), focus will change to the window under the cursor when changing from tiled-to-floating and vice versa. If 2, focus will also follow mouse on float-to-float switches.

name: input:special_fallthrough
description: if enabled, having only floating windows in the special workspace will not block focusing windows in the regular workspace.

name: input:off_window_axis_events
description: How to handle axis events around a focused window.

name: input:emulate_discrete_scroll
description: Emulates discrete scrolling from high resolution scrolling events.

name: input:follow_mouse_shrink
description: Shrinks the inactive window hitboxes used for focus detection by the specified number of pixels. This creates a dead zone in gaps between windows where moving the cursor will not change focus. Works only with follow_mouse = 1.

name: input:touchpad:disable_while_typing
description: Disable the touchpad while typing.

name: input:touchpad:natural_scroll
description: Inverts scrolling direction.

name: input:touchpad:scroll_factor
description: Multiplier applied to the amount of scroll movement.

name: input:touchpad:middle_button_emulation
description: Sending LMB and RMB simultaneously will be interpreted as a middle click.

name: input:touchpad:tap_button_map
description: Sets the tap button mapping for touchpad button emulation. [lrm/lmr]

name: input:touchpad:clickfinger_behavior
description: Button presses with 1, 2, or 3 fingers will be mapped to LMB, RMB, and MMB respectively.

name: input:touchpad:tap-to-click
description: Tapping on the touchpad with 1, 2, or 3 fingers will send LMB, RMB, and MMB respectively.

name: input:touchpad:drag_lock
description: When enabled, lifting the finger off while dragging will not drop the dragged item.

name: input:touchpad:tap-and-drag
description: Sets the tap and drag mode for the touchpad

name: input:touchpad:flip_x
description: Inverts the horizontal movement of the touchpad

name: input:touchpad:flip_y
description: Inverts the vertical movement of the touchpad

name: input:touchpad:drag_3fg
description: Whether to use 3 or 4 finger drag.

name: input:touchdevice:transform
description: Transform the input from touchdevices.

name: input:touchdevice:output
description: The monitor to bind touch devices.

name: input:touchdevice:enabled
description: Whether input is enabled for touch devices.

name: input:virtualkeyboard:share_states
description: Unify key down states and modifier states with other keyboards.

name: input:virtualkeyboard:release_pressed_on_close
description: Release all pressed keys by virtual keyboard on close.

name: input:tablet:transform
description: transform the input from tablets.

name: input:tablet:output
description: the monitor to bind tablets.

name: input:tablet:region_position
description: position of the mapped region in monitor layout.

name: input:tablet:absolute_region_position
description: whether to treat the region_position as an absolute position in monitor layout.

name: input:tablet:region_size
description: size of the mapped region.

name: input:tablet:relative_input
description: whether the input should be relative

name: input:tablet:left_handed
description: if enabled, the tablet will be rotated 180 degrees

name: input:tablet:active_area_size
description: size of tablet's active area in mm

name: input:tablet:active_area_position
description: position of the active area in mm

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_distance
description: in px, the distance of the touchpad gesture

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_touch
description: enable workspace swiping from the edge of a touchscreen

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_invert
description: invert the direction (touchpad only)

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_touch_invert
description: invert the direction (touchscreen only)

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_min_speed_to_force
description: minimum speed in px per timepoint to force the change ignoring cancel_ratio.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_cancel_ratio
description: how much the swipe has to proceed in order to commence it.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_create_new
description: whether a swipe right on the last workspace should create a new one.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_direction_lock
description: if enabled, switching direction will be locked when you swipe past the direction_lock_threshold.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_direction_lock_threshold
description: in px, the distance to swipe before direction lock activates.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_forever
description: if enabled, swiping will not clamp at the neighboring workspaces but continue to the further ones.

name: gestures:workspace_swipe_use_r
description: if enabled, swiping will use the r prefix instead of the m prefix for finding workspaces.

name: gestures:close_max_timeout
description: Timeout for closing windows with the close gesture, in ms.

name: gestures:scrolling:move_snap_to_grid
description: When releasing the scroll move gesture, whether it shoud try to snap to the grid.

name: gestures:scrolling:move_snap_cursor
description: When releasing the scroll move gesture, whether it shoud snap the cursor to the newly focused window.

name: group:insert_after_current
description: whether new windows in a group spawn after current or at group tail

name: group:focus_removed_window
description: whether Hyprland should focus on the window that has just been moved out of the group

name: group:merge_groups_on_drag
description: whether window groups can be dragged into other groups

name: group:merge_groups_on_groupbar
description: whether one group will be merged with another when dragged into its groupbar

name: group:col.border_active
description: active group border color

name: group:col.border_inactive
description: inactive group border color

name: group:col.border_locked_inactive
description: inactive locked group border color

name: group:col.border_locked_active
description: active locked group border color

name: group:auto_group
description: automatically group new windows

name: group:drag_into_group
description: whether dragging a window into a unlocked group will merge them.

name: group:merge_floated_into_tiled_on_groupbar
description: whether dragging a floating window into a tiled window groupbar will merge them

name: group:group_on_movetoworkspace
description: whether using movetoworkspace[silent] will merge the window into the workspace's solitary unlocked group

name: group:groupbar:enabled
description: enables groupbars

name: group:groupbar:font_family
description: font used to display groupbar titles

name: group:groupbar:font_weight_active
description: weight of the font used to display active groupbar titles

name: group:groupbar:font_weight_inactive
description: weight of the font used to display inactive groupbar titles

name: group:groupbar:font_size
description: font size of groupbar title

name: group:groupbar:gradients
description: enables gradients

name: group:groupbar:height
description: height of the groupbar

name: group:groupbar:indicator_gap
description: height of the gap between the groupbar indicator and title

name: group:groupbar:indicator_height
description: height of the groupbar indicator

name: group:groupbar:stacked
description: render the groupbar as a vertical stack

name: group:groupbar:priority
description: sets the decoration priority for groupbars

name: group:groupbar:render_titles
description: whether to render titles in the group bar decoration

name: group:groupbar:scrolling
description: whether scrolling in the groupbar changes group active window

name: group:groupbar:middle_click_close
description: whether middle clicking the groupbar closes the clicked window

name: group:groupbar:rounding
description: how much to round the groupbar

name: group:groupbar:rounding_power
description: rounding power of groupbar corners (2 is a circle)

name: group:groupbar:gradient_rounding
description: how much to round the groupbar gradient

name: group:groupbar:gradient_rounding_power
description: rounding power of groupbar gradient corners (2 is a circle)

name: group:groupbar:round_only_edges
description: if yes, will only round at the groupbar edges

name: group:groupbar:gradient_round_only_edges
description: if yes, will only round at the groupbar gradient edges

name: group:groupbar:text_color
description: color for window titles in the groupbar

name: group:groupbar:text_color_inactive
description: color for inactive windows' titles in the groupbar

name: group:groupbar:text_color_locked_active
description: color for the active window's title in a locked group

name: group:groupbar:text_color_locked_inactive
description: color for inactive windows' titles in locked groups

name: group:groupbar:col.active
description: active group border color

name: group:groupbar:col.inactive
description: inactive (out of focus) group border color

name: group:groupbar:col.locked_active
description: active locked group border color

name: group:groupbar:col.locked_inactive
description: inactive locked group border color

name: group:groupbar:gaps_out
description: gap between gradients and window

name: group:groupbar:gaps_in
description: gap between gradients

name: group:groupbar:keep_upper_gap
description: keep an upper gap above gradient

name: group:groupbar:text_offset
description: set an offset for a text

name: group:groupbar:text_padding
description: set horizontal padding for a text

name: group:groupbar:blur
description: enable background blur for groupbars

name: misc:disable_hyprland_logo
description: disables the random Hyprland logo / anime girl background. :(

name: misc:disable_splash_rendering
description: disables the Hyprland splash rendering.

name: misc:col.splash
description: Changes the color of the splash text.

name: misc:font_family
description: Set the global default font to render the text.

name: misc:splash_font_family
description: Changes the font used to render the splash text.

name: misc:force_default_wallpaper
description: Force any of the 3 default wallpapers. [-1/0/1/2]

name: misc:vrr
description: controls the VRR (Adaptive Sync) of your monitors

name: misc:mouse_move_enables_dpms
description: If DPMS is set to off, wake up the monitors if the mouse moves

name: misc:key_press_enables_dpms
description: If DPMS is set to off, wake up the monitors if a key is pressed.

name: misc:name_vk_after_proc
description: Name virtual keyboards after the processes that create them.

name: misc:always_follow_on_dnd
description: Will make mouse focus follow the mouse when drag and dropping.

name: misc:layers_hog_keyboard_focus
description: If true, will make keyboard-interactive layers keep their focus on mouse move.

name: misc:animate_manual_resizes
description: If true, will animate manual window resizes/moves

name: misc:animate_mouse_windowdragging
description: If true, will animate windows being dragged by mouse.

name: misc:disable_autoreload
description: If true, the config will not reload automatically on save.

name: misc:enable_swallow
description: Enable window swallowing

name: misc:swallow_regex
description: The class regex to be used for windows that should be swallowed.

name: misc:swallow_exception_regex
description: The title regex to be used for windows that should not be swallowed.

name: misc:focus_on_activate
description: Whether Hyprland should focus an app that requests to be focused.

name: misc:mouse_move_focuses_monitor
description: Whether mouse moving into a different monitor should focus it

name: misc:allow_session_lock_restore
description: if true, will allow you to restart a lockscreen app in case it crashes.

name: misc:session_lock_xray
description: keep rendering workspaces below your lockscreen

name: misc:background_color
description: change the background color.

name: misc:close_special_on_empty
description: close the special workspace if the last window is removed

name: misc:on_focus_under_fullscreen
description: if there is a fullscreen or maximized window, decide whether a tiled window requested to focus should replace it.

name: misc:exit_window_retains_fullscreen
description: if true, closing a fullscreen window makes the next focused window fullscreen

name: misc:initial_workspace_tracking
description: if enabled, windows will open on the workspace they were invoked on.

name: misc:middle_click_paste
description: whether to enable middle-click-paste (aka primary selection)

name: misc:render_unfocused_fps
description: the maximum limit for renderunfocused windows' fps in the background

name: misc:disable_xdg_env_checks
description: disable the warning if XDG environment is externally managed

name: misc:disable_hyprland_guiutils_check
description: disable the warning if hyprland-guiutils is missing

name: misc:disable_watchdog_warning
description: whether to disable the warning about not using start-hyprland.

name: misc:lockdead_screen_delay
description: the delay in ms after the lockdead screen appears.

name: misc:enable_anr_dialog
description: whether to enable the ANR (app not responding) dialog when your apps hang

name: misc:anr_missed_pings
description: number of missed pings before showing the ANR dialog

name: misc:screencopy_force_8b
description: forces 8 bit screencopy

name: misc:disable_scale_notification
description: disables notification popup when a monitor fails to set a suitable scale

name: misc:size_limits_tiled
description: whether to apply minsize and maxsize rules to tiled windows

name: binds:pass_mouse_when_bound
description: if disabled, will not pass the mouse events to apps / dragging windows around if a keybind has been triggered.

name: binds:scroll_event_delay
description: in ms, how many ms to wait after a scroll event to allow passing another one for the binds.

name: binds:workspace_back_and_forth
description: If enabled, an attempt to switch to the currently focused workspace will instead switch to the previous workspace.

name: binds:hide_special_on_workspace_change
description: If enabled, changing the active workspace will hide the special workspace on the monitor.

name: binds:allow_workspace_cycles
description: If enabled, workspaces don't forget their previous workspace.

name: binds:workspace_center_on
description: Whether switching workspaces should center the cursor on the workspace (0) or on the last active window (1)

name: binds:focus_preferred_method
description: sets the preferred focus finding method when using focuswindow/movewindow/etc with a direction.

name: binds:ignore_group_lock
description: If enabled, dispatchers like moveintogroup, moveoutofgroup and movewindoworgroup will ignore lock per group.

name: binds:movefocus_cycles_fullscreen
description: If enabled, when on a fullscreen window, movefocus will cycle fullscreen.

name: binds:movefocus_cycles_groupfirst
description: If enabled, when in a grouped window, movefocus will cycle windows in the groups first.

name: binds:disable_keybind_grabbing
description: If enabled, apps that request keybinds to be disabled will not be able to do so.

name: binds:window_direction_monitor_fallback
description: If enabled, moving a window or focus over the edge of a monitor with a direction will move it to the next monitor.

name: binds:allow_pin_fullscreen
description: Allows fullscreen to pinned windows, and restore their pinned status afterwards

name: binds:drag_threshold
description: Movement threshold in pixels for window dragging and c/g bind flags. 0 to disable.

name: xwayland:enabled
description: allow running applications using X11

name: xwayland:use_nearest_neighbor
description: uses the nearest neighbor filtering for xwayland apps, making them pixelated rather than blurry

name: xwayland:force_zero_scaling
description: forces a scale of 1 on xwayland windows on scaled displays.

name: xwayland:create_abstract_socket
description: Create the abstract Unix domain socket for XWayland

name: opengl:nvidia_anti_flicker
description: reduces flickering on nvidia at the cost of possible frame drops on lower-end GPUs.

name: render:direct_scanout
description: Enables direct scanout.

name: render:expand_undersized_textures
description: Whether to expand textures that have not yet resized to be larger.

name: render:xp_mode
description: Disable back buffer and bottom layer rendering.

name: render:ctm_animation
description: Whether to enable a fade animation for CTM changes.

name: render:cm_enabled
description: Enable Color Management pipelines (requires restart to fully take effect)

name: render:send_content_type
description: Report content type to allow monitor profile autoswitch

name: render:cm_auto_hdr
description: Auto-switch to hdr mode when fullscreen app is in hdr

name: render:new_render_scheduling
description: enable new render scheduling, which should improve FPS on underpowered devices.

name: render:non_shader_cm
description: Enable CM without shader.

name: render:cm_sdr_eotf
description: Default transfer function for displaying SDR apps.

name: render:commit_timing_enabled
description: Enable commit timing proto. Requires restart

name: render:icc_vcgt_enabled
description: Enable sending VCGT ramps to KMS with ICC profiles

name: render:use_shader_blur_blend
description: Use experimental blurred bg blending

name: render:use_fp16
description: Use experimental internal FP16 buffer.

name: render:keep_unmodified_copy
description: Keep umodified SDR frame copy for sreensharing.

name: render:non_shader_cm_interop
description: non_shader_cm interaction with ctm proto (hyprsunset and similar).

name: render:fp16_sdr_tf
description: Internal workbuffer transfer function for fp16 in SDR mode

name: cursor:invisible
description: don't render cursors

name: cursor:no_hardware_cursors
description: disables hardware cursors.

name: cursor:no_break_fs_vrr
description: disables scheduling new frames on cursor movement for fullscreen apps with VRR enabled.

name: cursor:min_refresh_rate
description: minimum refresh rate for cursor movement when no_break_fs_vrr is active.

name: cursor:hotspot_padding
description: the padding, in logical px, between screen edges and the cursor

name: cursor:inactive_timeout
description: in seconds, after how many seconds of cursor's inactivity to hide it. Set to 0 for never.

name: cursor:no_warps
description: if true, will not warp the cursor in many cases

name: cursor:persistent_warps
description: When a window is refocused, the cursor returns to its last position relative to that window.

name: cursor:warp_on_change_workspace
description: Move the cursor to the last focused window after changing the workspace.

name: cursor:warp_on_toggle_special
description: Move the cursor to the last focused window when toggling a special workspace.

name: cursor:default_monitor
description: the name of a default monitor for the cursor to be set to on startup

name: cursor:zoom_factor
description: the factor to zoom by around the cursor. 1 means no zoom.

name: cursor:zoom_rigid
description: whether the zoom should follow the cursor rigidly or loosely

name: cursor:zoom_disable_aa
description: If enabled, when zooming, no antialiasing will be used

name: cursor:zoom_detached_camera
description: Detaches the camera from the mouse when zoomed in

name: cursor:enable_hyprcursor
description: whether to enable hyprcursor support

name: cursor:hide_on_key_press
description: Hides the cursor when you press any key until the mouse is moved.

name: cursor:hide_on_touch
description: Hides the cursor when the last input was a touch input until a mouse input is done.

name: cursor:hide_on_tablet
description: Hides the cursor when the last input was a tablet input until a mouse input is done.

name: cursor:use_cpu_buffer
description: Makes HW cursors use a CPU buffer.

name: cursor:sync_gsettings_theme
description: sync xcursor theme with gsettings

name: cursor:warp_back_after_non_mouse_input
description: warp the cursor back to where it was after using a non-mouse input to move it.

name: ecosystem:no_update_news
description: disable the popup that shows up when you update hyprland to a new version.

name: ecosystem:no_donation_nag
description: disable the popup that shows up twice a year encouraging to donate.

name: ecosystem:enforce_permissions
description: whether to enable permission control.

name: debug:overlay
description: print the debug performance overlay.

name: debug:damage_blink
description: flash damaged areas

name: debug:gl_debugging
description: enable OpenGL debugging and error checking.

name: debug:disable_logs
description: disable logging to a file

name: debug:disable_time
description: disables time logging

name: debug:damage_tracking
description: redraw only the needed bits of the display.

name: debug:enable_stdout_logs
description: enables logging to stdout

name: debug:manual_crash
description: set to 1 and then back to 0 to crash Hyprland.

name: debug:suppress_errors
description: if true, do not display config file parsing errors.

name: debug:disable_scale_checks
description: disables verification of the scale factors.

name: debug:error_limit
description: limits the number of displayed config file parsing errors.

name: debug:error_position
description: sets the position of the error bar.

name: debug:colored_stdout_logs
description: enables colors in the stdout logs.

name: debug:log_damage
description: enables logging the damage.

name: debug:pass
description: enables render pass debugging.

name: debug:full_cm_proto
description: claims support for all cm proto features (requires restart)

name: debug:ds_handle_same_buffer
description: Special case for DS with unmodified buffer

name: debug:ds_handle_same_buffer_fifo
description: Special case for DS with unmodified buffer unlocks fifo

name: debug:fifo_pending_workaround
description: Fifo workaround for empty pending list

name: debug:render_solitary_wo_damage
description: Render solitary window with empty damage

name: debug:vfr
description: controls the VFR status of Hyprland. Do not turn off unless debugging

name: debug:invalidate_fp16
description: allow fp16 buffer invalidation.

name: layout:single_window_aspect_ratio
description: If specified, whenever only a single window is open, it will be coerced into the specified aspect ratio.

name: layout:single_window_aspect_ratio_tolerance
description: Minimum distance for single_window_aspect_ratio to take effect.

name: dwindle:force_split
description: force a split direction for new windows

name: dwindle:preserve_split
description: if enabled, the split will not change regardless of what happens to the container.

name: dwindle:smart_split
description: if enabled, allows a more precise control over the window split direction based on the cursor's position.

name: dwindle:smart_resizing
description: if enabled, resizing direction will be determined by the mouse's position on the window.

name: dwindle:permanent_direction_override
description: if enabled, makes the preselect direction persist.

name: dwindle:special_scale_factor
description: specifies the scale factor of windows on the special workspace

name: dwindle:split_width_multiplier
description: specifies the auto-split width multiplier

name: dwindle:use_active_for_splits
description: whether to prefer the active window or the mouse position for splits

name: dwindle:default_split_ratio
description: the default split ratio on window open.

name: dwindle:split_bias
description: specifies which window will receive the split ratio.

name: dwindle:precise_mouse_move
description: if enabled, bindm movewindow will drop the window more precisely depending on where your mouse is.

name: master:allow_small_split
description: enable adding additional master windows in a horizontal split style

name: master:special_scale_factor
description: the scale of the special workspace windows.

name: master:mfact
description: the size as a percentage of the master window.

name: master:new_status
description: `master`: new window becomes master; `slave`: new windows are added to slave stack; `inherit`: inherit from focused window

name: master:new_on_top
description: whether a newly open window should be on the top of the stack

name: master:new_on_active
description: `before`, `after`: place new window relative to the focused window; `none`: place new window according to new_on_top.

name: master:orientation
description: default placement of the master area

name: master:slave_count_for_center_master
description: when using orientation=center, make the master window centered only when at least this many slave windows are open.

name: master:center_master_fallback
description: Set fallback for center master when slaves are less than slave_count_for_center_master

name: master:center_ignores_reserved
description: centers the master window on monitor ignoring reserved areas

name: master:smart_resizing
description: if enabled, resizing direction will be determined by the mouse's position on the window.

name: master:drop_at_cursor
description: when enabled, dragging and dropping windows will put them at the cursor position.

name: master:always_keep_position
description: whether to keep the master window in its configured position when there are no slave windows

name: scrolling:fullscreen_on_one_column
description: when enabled, a single column on a workspace will always span the entire screen.

name: scrolling:column_width
description: the default width of a column.

name: scrolling:focus_fit_method
description: When a column is focused, what method should be used to bring it into view

name: scrolling:follow_focus
description: when a window is focused, should the layout move to bring it into view automatically

name: scrolling:follow_min_visible
description: when a window is focused, require that at least a given fraction of it is visible for focus to follow

name: scrolling:explicit_column_widths
description: A comma-separated list of preconfigured widths for colresize +conf/-conf

name: scrolling:direction
description: Direction in which new windows appear and the layout scrolls

name: scrolling:wrap_focus
description: Determines if column focus wraps around

name: scrolling:wrap_swapcol
description: Determines if column movement wraps around

name: experimental:wp_cm_1_2
description: Allow wp-cm-v1 version 2

name: quirks:prefer_hdr
description: Prefer HDR mode.

name: quirks:skip_non_kms_dmabuf_formats
description: Do not report dmabuf formats which cannot be imported into KMS
